id.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching their auth UID.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

PdfDocument.title: PDF Document
PdfDocument.description: Represents a PDF document uploaded by a user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the document.

userId.description: The ID of the user who uploaded the document.

url.description: The public URL to access the PDF file in Firebase Storage.

storagePath.description: The path to the file in Firebase Storage.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the document was uploaded.

id.description: The unique identifier for the session.

hostId.description: The user ID of the session host.

songId.description: The ID of the PDF document being viewed.

scroll.description: The current scroll position of the document.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the session was created.

SessionParticipant.title: Session Participant
SessionParticipant.description: Represents a user who has joined a session.

id.description: The unique identifier for the participant entry, usually the user's UID.

userId.description: The ID of the user who joined.

sessionId.description: The ID of the session they joined.

displayName.description: The display name of the user who joined.

photoURL.description: URL of the participant's profile picture.

joinedAt.description: The timestamp when the user joined the session.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public profiles for all users.

/users/{userId}/pdf_documents/{pdfDocume.description: A user's private collection of PDF documents.

/pdf_documents/{pdfDocumentId}.description: A top-level collection for publicly readable documents.

/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Contains data for a single collaborative session.

/sessions/{sessionId}/sessionParticipant.description: A subcollection tracking users who have joined a session.
